theme: SLOPE v1.0 — SlopeStore + Sessions + Hooks + MCP Tools

shots.title: SlopeStore interface + extended SprintClaim in core
Create store-sqlite package scaffold

hazards.description: better-sqlite3 native build required pnpm approve-builds; worked around via package.json onlyBuiltDependencies

shots.notes: New package creation with native dep

shots.title: Implement SqliteSlopeStore
shots.notes: WAL mode, FK constraints, CASCADE deletes, upsert semantics — all clean on first build

shots.title: Store-SQLite tests — 22 tests
shots.notes: All 22 tests passed on first run

shots.title: slope session command + resolveStore()
shots.notes: Dynamic import pattern for store resolution

shots.title: slope hook command — add/remove/list/show
shots.notes: Embedded templates with managed section markers

shots.title: Enhanced init + migrate claim commands to store

hazards.description: initCommand became async — broke 5 existing tests that called it synchronously without await

shots.notes: Fixed by adding async/await to test callbacks

shots.title: MCP session/claim tools + integration tests
shots.notes: 3 new MCP tools behind store guard, findProjectRoot(), 30 tests

shots.title: Final tests + CLAUDE.md update

hazards.description: RecurringPattern.id is number not string — test type mismatch caught by typecheck
store-sqlite tsconfig.json needed to exclude *.test.ts from build

shots.notes: Two minor fixes during final verification

shots.title: Bump all to v1.0.0 + publish prep

conditions.description: Large sprint (11 tickets across 3 sub-sprints) — highest ticket count yet
New external dependency (better-sqlite3) with native compilation

nutrition.description: Clean deprecation path — old registries kept functional
Integration tests for MCP + real SQLite

nineteenth_hole.how_did_it_feel: Extremely smooth for an 11-ticket sprint. The plan's execution order was well-designed — each ticket built cleanly on the previous.
nineteenth_hole.advice_for_next_player: The store-sqlite package uses better-sqlite3 which needs native compilation. If you see build failures, check pnpm onlyBuiltDependencies in root package.json.
nineteenth_hole.what_surprised_you: Only 3 hazards across 11 tickets. The extended SprintClaim approach (D2) eliminated all type-mapping friction — no toSprintClaim() adapter needed.
nineteenth_hole.excited_about_next: v1.0 is shipped. Ready for session-start/end hooks to auto-register sessions, and the deferred hook subcommands (update/freeze/diff) in v1.1.

bunker_locations: better-sqlite3 native build requires pnpm onlyBuiltDependencies approval
Making sync functions async breaks callers that don't await the returned promise
tsconfig.json must exclude *.test.ts when tests live in src/ alongside implementation
yardage_book_updates: SlopeStore extends SprintRegistry — add sessions/scorecards/common-issues on top of existing claim interface
resolveStore() uses dynamic import() for store-sqlite — keeps CLI dependency optional at type level
better-sqlite3 CASCADE deletes make session cleanup automatic for associated claims
findProjectRoot() walks up from cwd looking for .slope/config.json — same pattern as loadConfig()
course_management_notes: 11 tickets, 9 in_the_hole, 2 green — no misses across the entire sprint
3 hazards encountered but all resolved quickly (async test fix, type mismatch, tsconfig exclude)
Commit-per-ticket discipline maintained — 11 commits for 11 tickets
Push after S-1-4, S-2-3, S-3-1, S-3-3 — 4 pushes matching plan
